positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a mountain silhouette range viewed at sunset. The sky transitions through warm hues of lavender, deep indigo, and burnt orange, contrasted sharply with the dark, minimalist mountain peaks. Include several playful, simple geometric elements floating in the sky, such as stylized hot air balloons, crescent moons, and shooting stars. The overall style should be modern, clean, and highly graphic, reminiscent of Scandinavian design and linocut prints. Strong silhouettes, central composition, designed for high contrast on apparel fabric. Crisp, vector-like lines, limited color palette (navy, mustard yellow, terracotta, lavender).
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, gradient skin, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, typography, cartoon, photorealistic, 3d render
